prompt:
Use case: historical-scene
Asset type: character-free 16:9 background plate for scene 5 of a layered paper-collage animation
Input images: Image 1 is the approved creek style sample; keep the same location and handcrafted paper language
Primary request: the creek at a quieter reflective moment, with an empty bank and a polished iron-pestle silhouette lying near the grinding stone, while the water catches a warmer patch of light
Scene/backdrop: cool teal creek and bamboo reflection transitioning toward muted ochre; no people; leave room for Li Bai and translucent memory-page layers
Style/medium: premium handcrafted Chinese paper collage, mulberry fibers, matte mineral pigment, restrained ink, subtle paper relief
Composition/framing: wide 16:9; visual focus moves from lower-right pestle area toward open center-left standing space; calm negative space, subtitle-safe lower band, no foreground reeds
Lighting/mood: inward-looking, quiet realization; gradual warmth without glow explosion
Constraints: no finished needle, no people, no hands, no written characters, captions, signs, watermark, logo, modern items or border
Avoid: magical aura, glossy 3D, plastic cartoon, photorealism, anime, text-like marks
